description: Repo-local tool, MCP, and worktree boundaries. AGENTS.md-defined generic rules and platform permission rules are not repeated here.
native_first_rule: MUST use local tools and repo-local guides/knowledge/specs before considering MCP or external tools.
mcp_unnecessary_conditions: Local shell or repo search can answer
Simple text replacement or local file edit
mcp_acceptable_conditions: Need latest official docs for external packages
Need external system response for contract/auth verification
Need observable record of high-risk decision

ast_search_rewrite.reason: Structural codemod is rare in this repo; use ast-grep only for broad, clear patterns across 10+ files.

optional_cli_missing.rule: MUST NOT block the task when an optional CLI is unavailable; use a portable fallback.

must_not: Create, switch to, or use git worktree
